TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ngudra-drekai (新富社區 Rukay 部落) ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 113 buwan, 344 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 338 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 6 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Ngudra-drekai ga Kaaluan ru Maljivel. rekisi qalang Ngudra-drekai ga pzyang qalang nqu drekai. kayal kyokay qalang Ngudra-drekai ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ngudra-drekai ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai (**** rukaj **) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa kaaluan ru malji*el. rekis~ɕi qalaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa pzjaŋ qalaŋ nqu *rekai. kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ngudra-drekai (新富社區 Rukay 部落) ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 113 buwan, 344 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 338 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 6 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Ngudra-drekai ga Kaaluan ru Maljivel. rekisi qalang Ngudra-drekai ga pzyang qalang nqu drekai. kayal kyokay qalang Ngudra-drekai ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ngudra-drekai ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai (**** rukaj **) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa kaaluan ru malji*el. rekis~ɕi qalaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa pzjaŋ qalaŋ nqu *rekai. kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ŋu*ra-*rekai ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
